description: Portrait-orientation quote card built on a photograph of President Trump seated at a conference table in front of a wood-paneled wall bearing the large gold-and-black Seal of the President of the United States ('SEAL OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES' encircling the eagle). Trump wears a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, a navy suit, white shirt, and red tie, looking forward; the foreground table is dark and slightly blurred. The lower portion of the image darkens into a vignette carrying white text with a large white opening quotation mark. The text reads verbatim: '"If you hurt Americans, or are planning to hurt Americans, We Will Find You & We Will Kill You' followed by the attribution 'President Donald J. Trump'.
notable_text: If you hurt Americans, or are planning to hurt Americans, We Will Find You & We Will Kill You - President Donald J. Trump
